title: Silky Bitter American Chicken Stir-fry
description: A post-workout dish featuring chicken stock, whisked plant-based ingredients for a silky texture and bitter notes to complement the workout routine.

ingredients.name: whisked plant-based milk or cream substitute

instructions: Heat sesame oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add bitter greens, ginger, and red pepper flakes if using. Stir-fry until wilted and slightly caramelized.
Pour chicken stock into the pan. Allow to simmer for about 2-3 minutes, allowing flavors to meld together.
Whisk in whisked plant-based milk or cream substitute until combined and smooth.
Reduce heat to low and let the soup cook down, stirring occasionally, until it thickens slightly and reaches desired consistency.
Serve hot over cooked grains or noodles.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
